warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets (A4, side by side rotated 90 degrees) combined into one landscape scan. This is the physical LEFT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg counter-clockwise to read), the higher-numbered sheet (แผ่นที่ 20/20 -- final sheet of the ฐานรากแผ่ ไม่มีระบบปรับอากาศ 20-sheet BOQ document), paired with แผ่นที่ 19/20 (4.3+4.4 detail) extracted as _1.json.

This sheet is essentially blank apart from the หมวดที่ 5 category header row -- the grid below has no printed item rows, quantities, or a 'รวมข้อ 5' subtotal visible. Header text itself was small and rotated; transcribed at reduced confidence, recommend human re-check.

This is the final sheet (20/20) of the spread-footing (ฐานรากแผ่ ไม่มีระบบปรับอากาศ) BOQ document for this house -- no 'รวมทั้งสิ้น' (grand total) row or VAT calculation visible on this sheet either, consistent with all monetary columns being blank throughout this house's BOQ (unit prices never filled in the source).
